tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceCreateApplication.createApplication
tools.description: Adds an application that is created from a resource group.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceCreateComponent.createComponent
tools.description: Creates a custom component by grouping similar standalone instances to monitor.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceCreateLogPattern.createLogPattern
tools.description: Adds an log pattern to a LogPatternSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDeleteApplication.deleteApplication
tools.description: Removes the specified application from monitoring. Does not delete the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDeleteComponent.deleteComponent
tools.description: Ungroups a custom component. When you ungroup custom components, all applicable monitors that are set up for the component are removed and the instances revert to their standalone status.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDeleteLogPattern.deleteLogPattern
tools.description: Removes the specified log pattern from a LogPatternSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeApplication.describeApplication
tools.description: Describes the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeComponent.describeComponent
tools.description: Describes a component and lists the resources that are grouped together in a component.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeComponentConfiguration.describeComponentConfiguration
tools.description: Describes the monitoring configuration of the component.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeComponentConfigurationRecommendation.describeComponentConfigurationRecommendation
tools.description: Describes the recommended monitoring configuration of the component.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeLogPattern.describeLogPattern
tools.description: Describe a specific log pattern from a LogPatternSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeObservation.describeObservation
tools.description: Describes an anomaly or error with the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeProblem.describeProblem
tools.description: Describes an application problem.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceDescribeProblemObservations.describeProblemObservations
tools.description: Describes the anomalies or errors associated with the problem.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListApplications.listApplications
tools.description: Lists the IDs of the applications that you are monitoring.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListComponents.listComponents
tools.description: Lists the auto-grouped, standalone, and custom components of the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListConfigurationHistory.listConfigurationHistory
tools.description:
Lists the INFO, WARN, and ERROR events for periodic configuration updates performed by Application Insights. Examples of events represented are:

  • INFO: creating a new alarm or updating an alarm threshold.

  • WARN: alarm not created due to insufficient data points used to predict thresholds.

  • ERROR: alarm not created due to permission errors or exceeding quotas.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListLogPatterns.listLogPatterns
tools.description: Lists the log patterns in the specific log LogPatternSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListLogPatternSets.listLogPatternSets
tools.description: Lists the log pattern sets in the specific application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListProblems.listProblems
tools.description: Lists the problems with your application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieve a list of the tags (keys and values) that are associated with a specified application. A tag is a label that you optionally define and associate with an application. Each tag consists of a required tag key and an optional associated tag value. A tag key is a general label that acts as a category for more specific tag values. A tag value acts as a descriptor within a tag key.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceTagResource.tagResource
tools.description:
Add one or more tags (keys and values) to a specified application. A tag is a label that you optionally define and associate with an application. Tags can help you categorize and manage application in different ways, such as by purpose, owner, environment, or other criteria.

Each tag consists of a required tag key and an associated tag value, both of which you define. A tag key is a general label that acts as a category for more specific tag values. A tag value acts as a descriptor within a tag key.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Remove one or more tags (keys and values) from a specified application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceUpdateApplication.updateApplication
tools.description: Updates the application.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceUpdateComponent.updateComponent
tools.description: Updates the custom component name and/or the list of resources that make up the component.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceUpdateComponentConfiguration.updateComponentConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the monitoring configurations for the component. The configuration input parameter is an escaped JSON of the configuration and should match the schema of what is returned by DescribeComponentConfigurationRecommendation.

tools.name: xAmzTargetEC2WindowsBarleyServiceUpdateLogPattern.updateLogPattern
tools.description: Adds a log pattern to a LogPatternSet.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
